description:STRING: 'The valley world represents a large exterior field surrounded by mountains. The valley consists of  one room
previewGIF:STRING: an outdoor space.  The valley is designed as a ready-to-use environment and has an entry-point object (these move avatars to their original spot upon entering the world).'

description:STRING: 'The hill top world represents a large exterior meadow surrounded by trees and distant mountains.  It consists of  one room
previewGIF:STRING: an outdoor space.  The hilltop is designed as a ready-to-use environment and has an entry-point object (these move avatars to their original spot upon entering the world).
